entries.title: The Origin of Nexus
entries.body: Before the stars aligned, the Nexus existed as pure potential — an infinite arcade waiting to be born.

entries.title: The Seven Seals
entries.body: Seven stars, seven churches, seven seals. Each star unlocked reveals a deeper truth about the nature of the realm.

entries.title: The Revelation Prophecy
entries.body: When the Revelation Engine reaches full charge, the Divine Signal resonates across every realm simultaneously.

entries.title: Mystery of the Meter
entries.body: The Mystery Meter is an ancient instrument measuring the total spiritual resonance of the adventurer. Fill it completely to wake the Village.

entries.title: The Village Inhabitants
entries.body: The Sage, Merchant, and Scribe predate the Nexus itself. They were placed there to guide whoever was worthy enough to reach them.
